turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Hi, I'd like to book a table for two people tonight.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely! I'd be happy to help. What time would you like to make the reservation for, and do you have any specific preferences for seating?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yes, can we sit near the window, if possible? And I want to book next Tuesday, 8 p.m.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it! So, a table for two next Tuesday at 8 p.m., and you'd like to be seated near the window. That sounds great! Is there any special occasion or any dietary preferences I should know about?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yeah, I want to celebrate my friend's birthday, and do you have any decoration for us?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Oh, that sounds lovely! Yes, we can definitely arrange some decorations for the birthday. Could you let me know what kind of decorations you have in mind, or if there's a particular theme?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Will, could you give, could you prepare some candle for us? We want to bring a birthday cake for ourself. And could you, do you have the fridge? We want to refrigerate our cake.”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Do you have a menu online? We want to see the menu first.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, I can send you a link to our menu online. And if you have any questions about the dishes or need recommendations, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “And also, do you have a car park? Because we are driving on here.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, we do have a parking lot available for our guests, so you’ll have no trouble parking. If there's anything else you need, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “And my friend, do you have a vegetarian option? My friend is a vegetarian.”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “And also, is there any flexibility if we arrive 15 minutes late?”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Oh, by the way, the third seat is private, because if you have a room, private room is better, because we want to keep quiet.”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Sounds like great, and also, do you have any soft drink for us?”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I think that's all, thank you!”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Oh, by the way, we wanna change the time, I get the wrong time, it's not next Tuesday, it's next Wednesday, 8pm.”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “No, thank you. Uh, and, uh, and, uh, will I get the, the, uh, will I get the, will I get the, the,”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I mean, will I get the reservation message?”

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Thank you.”
